overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dark industrial alleyway at night. The player passes under a red pipe bridge, approaches a parked military truck with dead bodies nearby, and continues down the graffiti-covered corridor toward distant city lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial service alley with overhead pipe bridge

events.description: passing under the red pipe bridge overhead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the industrial alley toward the overhead bridge structure

entered.detail: tall weathered concrete walls lining both sides of the alley
metal chain-link fencing mounted atop the concrete walls
large red industrial pipe spanning the width of the alley overhead
yellowish artificial lights mounted periodically along the walls

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow industrial alley flanked by high concrete walls topped with chain-link fencing. The camera walks forward toward a prominent red pipe bridge spanning overhead, passing beneath it as artificial wall lights cast a yellowish glow on the dirt path.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial alley with military vehicle checkpoint

events.description: military truck with spotlight becomes visible ahead on the right
dead bodies become visible on the ground near the truck

agents.ego_description: approaching the parked military truck cautiously while observing the scene

notable_agents.action: military transport truck parked with spotlight illuminating the right wall

entered.detail: bodies lying on the dirt ground near the military truck
colorful graffiti tags and murals painted on the concrete walls

segments.scene_description: Having passed under the bridge, the alley opens slightly to reveal a large military truck parked ahead with its spotlight casting light on the wall. As the camera approaches, dead bodies become visible on the ground near the vehicle, and colorful graffiti covers the concrete walls.

events.description: slowing pace to examine the bodies and truck details
truck temporarily blocks right side view as camera passes extremely close

agents.ego_description: walking slowly past the military truck, examining the bodies and vehicle details

notable_agents.action: large military truck with red taillights and Militech branding, bodies lying beneath the rear section

segments.scene_description: The camera moves alongside the massive military truck, revealing red taillights and corporate branding. Dead bodies lie on the ground next to the vehicle's wheels, and the camera passes close enough for the truck to temporarily dominate the right side of the frame before being left behind.

events.description: passing the military truck, continuing down the open alley
barrel fire becomes visible on the right side ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing down the alley away from the truck toward distant city lights

entered.detail: burning barrel or fire pit providing warm light on the right side
another bridge or overpass structure visible at the far end of the alley

segments.scene_description: Having passed the truck, the camera continues down the long industrial alley. A burning barrel appears on the right, casting flickering light, while the alley stretches toward a distant bridge structure and city lights visible at the horizon under the night sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a claustrophobic industrial alley that gradually opens toward a distant city skyline. It begins by moving forward between high concrete walls and chain-link fences, passing beneath a prominent red pipe bridge illuminated by yellowish wall lights. As the camera emerges from under the bridge, the space expands to reveal a parked military truck casting a bright spotlight over colorful graffiti and dead bodies strewn across the dirt. The camera then glides alongside the massive vehicle, its red taillights and corporate branding dominating the frame before the truck is left behind. Finally, the path continues past a flickering burning barrel, stretching forward toward a distant bridge and the glowing lights of the city on the horizon.
